title: Clip Top Glass Jars - Set of 6 250ml Airtight Glass Jars with Lids and Silicone Seal for Pasta, Sourdough Starter, Chutney, Pickling, Kitchen Organisation - Empty Food Storage Jar Set (6 Pack)
features: INCLUDES LABELS AND PEN - Each set comes complete with six clip top jars 250ml, plus practical labels and a pen. This ensures that your kitchen is as organised as possible, allowing you to label and identify your favourite foods, preserves, or dry goods effortlessly. The transparent design also allows you to easily identify the contents without opening the glass jar with lid, making meal preparation simpler and more efficient.
description: HEFTMAN Clip Top Glass Jars - Set of 6 250ml Airtight Glass Jars with Lids and Silicone Seal for Pasta, Sourdough Starter, Chutney, Pickling, Kitchen Organisation - Empty Food Storage Jar Set (6 Pack) Upgrade your kitchen storage with the HEFTMAN Clip Top Jars 250ml - 6 Pack. Each glass storage jar is crafted from thick, transparent glass and features a sturdy clip top lid with an orange silicone ring, creating an airtight seal that locks in freshness and preserves the flavour of your ingredients. Whether you’re pickling vegetables, storing dry goods like oats and breadcrumbs, or keeping your homemade sourdough starter ready for baking, these versatile airtight glass storage jars have you covered. The included labels and pen make organisation effortless, while the robust construction ensures lasting durability. Easy to clean and maintain, these glass food jars with lids are dishwasher safe (PLEASE NOTE: Do NOT pour boiling hot water directly into the glass jar). Choose HEFTMAN for quality, convenience, and a touch of style in your kitchen.
